title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: `structured/native = PASS` / `manus = PREVIEW_ONLY` の想定監視順は次です。 - `run-slide-variant-matrix.js` は先に structured-native、次に manus を実行します（順次実行）。[run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L554) - 最初に作成される制御系: `delivery-dir/.run.lock`、その後 `delivery-dir/variants`。[run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L129) `structured-native` 側（PASS） - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/output.pptx` - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/output.pdf` - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/inspection-report.json` - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/repair-log.json` - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json` - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/content.attempt-0.json`（再試行があれば `attempt-*` が増える） - `delivery-dir/variants/structured-native/preview-attempt-0/`（PASS 時）[run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L247) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L563) `manus/nanobanana` 側（PREVIEW_ONLY） - `delivery-dir/variants/nanobanana-manus/raw-manus/` に生成済み成果（PPTX なし時あり） - `delivery-dir/variants/nanobanana-manus/preview-html/`（manifest から materialize） - `delivery-dir/variants/nanobanana-manus/inspection-report.json` - `delivery-dir/variants/nanobanana-manus/repair-log.json` - `delivery-dir/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json`（`status: PREVIEW_ONLY`） - `preview-entry`/`manifest` を manifest-write ロジックに基づき参照可能状態で持つ[run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L366) 完了判定（監視ポイント） - `delivery-dir/variant-matrix.json` が `status: READY_FOR_SELECTION` - `selected_variant: null`（未確定のまま） - `selection_required: true` - `variants.structured_native.status === PASS` - `variants.nanobanana_manus.status === PREVIEW_ONLY` ここが揃えばジョブは「完了（選択待ち）」扱い。[run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L563) 停止（stuck）判定 - `matrix.status !== READY_FOR_SELECTION`（例: どちらか FAIL）で `exit code 4` で終了、`[FAIL] Variant matrix incomplete`。[run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L629) - `MANUS` が失敗しても `writeFailedVariant` が対応 artifact を生成するが、`variant-matrix` が FAIL になるため未完了として扱う。 [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L217)
